channel.title: Luxe One Kattupakkam - Ultra-Premium Apartments on Property Scouts - Premium Real Estate in Chennai

item.title: Luxury Family Homes - Luxe One Kattupakkam
item.description: Premium Homes for Discerning Families Where Family Luxury Meets Security & Excellence Luxe One offers families the ultimate in premium living. Exclusive amenities, security, and lifestyle designed for discerning parents. Why Families Choose Luxe One Premium Education Access Top schools within 10 km: International curricula available Premium boarding options Excellent academics track record Holistic development focus Ultimate Security & Privacy Exclusive gated community with premium security Biometric access control and CCTV throughout Privacy maximized - Thoughtful spacing Concierge service available Emergency medical on standby Premium Family Amenities For Children:

item.title: Premium Investment - Luxe One Kattupakkam
item.description: Premium Investment: Luxe One Kattupakkam Achieve 14-17% Annualized Returns Luxe One represents premium investment positioning. Ultra-exclusive properties with strong tenant quality and capital appreciation potential. Expected Investment Returns Rental Yield: 8-10% p.a. 2BHK Investment Purchase: ₹70L - ₹78L Monthly Rental: ₹55K - ₹65K Annual: ₹6.6L - ₹7.8L Gross Yield: 8-10% 3BHK Investment Purchase: ₹98L - ₹1.2Cr Monthly Rental: ₹75K - ₹95K Annual: ₹9L - ₹11.4L Gross Yield: 8-10% Appreciation: 6-7% Annually Premium positioning drives appreciation Exclusive appeal attracts high-value tenants Growth area upside Total blended return: 14-17% annualized 5-Year Investment Projection Year 1: Property value ₹78L | Rental income ₹7.

item.title: Premium Investment Pricing - Luxe One
item.description: Premium Investment Pricing: Luxe One Luxury Investment. Premium Returns. Transparent Pricing. Luxe One offers investment-grade pricing with premium positioning and strong appreciation potential. Premium Pricing Structure 2BHK Ultra-Premium Base Price: ₹70L - ₹78L What’s Included: ✅ Imported Italian marble ✅ European kitchen systems ✅ Smart home automation ✅ Premium fixtures throughout ✅ All exclusive amenities ✅ 24/7 concierge service 3BHK Ultra-Premium Base Price: ₹98L - ₹1.2Cr Premium Features: ✅ Everything from 2BHK

item.title: Premium Location - Luxe One Kattupakkam
item.description: Premium Location: Luxe One Strategic Advantage Prime Positioning in Emerging Premium Corridor Luxe One is strategically positioned in Kattupakkam’s premium zone. Excellent connectivity combined with exclusive neighborhood appeal. Location Advantages Strategic Connectivity IT Parks: 20 minutes drive (direct access) DLF Cybercity TCS Centers Infosys Parks Growing commercial developments Airport: 20 minutes via express route Quick business travel International connectivity City Center: 30 minutes to downtown Business meetings convenient Shopping & entertainment Premium Neighborhood Emerging Premium Corridor:

item.title: Premium NRI Investment - Luxe One Kattupakkam
item.description: Luxe One for Premium NRI Investors Invest in Ultra-Exclusive Indian Luxury. Earn in Your Currency. Global Appeal. Luxe One attracts premium NRI investors globally. Ultra-exclusive positioning, strong rental demand, and international appreciation potential. Premium NRI Investment Advantages Ultra-Exclusive FPI Investment ✅ Globally-exclusive limited units (only 120) ✅ Premium international tenant appeal ✅ Strong capital appreciation ✅ Full ownership & inheritance rights ✅ 100% remote investment process Premium Global Appeal Attracts high-value NRI tenants International expatriate professionals Premium rental command Strong tenant quality Global brand recognition Pricing in Your Currency 2BHK Ultra-Premium In USD:

item.title: Ultra-Luxury Living - Luxe One Kattupakkam
item.description: Luxe One: The Ultimate in Luxury Exclusivity. Excellence. Prestige. Perfected. Luxe One is for those who accept nothing less than the absolute best. Limited units, ultra-premium everything, and uncompromising quality. The Exclusivity Promise Only 120 Units Globally Ultra-exclusive positioning Limited availability (scarcity drives value) Curated resident base Private community feel Appreciating asset through exclusivity Premium Everything Ultra-Premium Finishes: Imported Italian marble European kitchen systems Smart home standard Premium sanitary ware (top global brands) Architectural excellence Exclusive Amenities:
